titleStmt.title: SII 7.342: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 342. (A.R. No. 149 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracā
maracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1318neya varttamāna yuva saṁva
tsarada śrāvaṇa su 2 gu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara pūrvvadakṣiṇa
paścima samudrādhīśvara śrīvīraharihararāyana nirūpadiṁ śrīmatu mallapavo
ḍeyaru tuḷu hayiveyarājyava pālisuva kāladalu bārakūra cikkamalla
ppagaḷu kellaṁgeṟeya vināyakadēvara kajhāyāda dharmakke Ā vināyaka
dēvara dēvasvada bāḷanū Arthaparitsēdavāgi koṭṭu mūlaparatsēdu koṁḍu
dharmmava koṭṭa bāḷina vivara cōḷiyakēryya keṟesaṁkadapaḍuva votina
li teṁginatōṭada catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu heddāriyiṁda paḍu
valu teṁkalu saṁkadatōḍiṁda baḍagalu muḍalu paḍuvaṇa Ācari
yavara tōṭadiṁ muḍalu baḍagalu teṁka Ācariyara tōṭadiṁ
teṁkalu yiṁttī catussīmeya voḷaguḷa tōṭa kkellaṁgeṟeya yī
śāṁnya diśalu hosatāgi māḍida bāḷu catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu U
ḍuva baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Abbeya baḷiyavara bāḷiṁdaṁ
baḍagalu paḍuvalu siri siṁgamūliya bāḷiṁda muḍalu baḍagalu
Uḍuvara baḷivara bāḷiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi catusīmege yettida Agaḷi
ṁda voḷage vuḷaṁthā bāḷu yeraḍu ṭhāvina tōṭadiṁda kellaṁgeṟeya
vināyakadēvarige dinaṁprati naḍasuva paṁcakajhūyike kabbu bāḷe
yahaṁṇu teṁginakāyi kaḍale bella Aṁtū kajhāyi 5 ke
ya dīvigeya yeṁṇege tā 1 Ubhayaṁ tā 6 A
kṣāradalu tāva Āṟara mariyādeyalu Ā caṁdrarkkavāgi
cauḷiyakēriya Ayivaru halaru naḍasikoḍuvaru yeraḍu
ṭhāvina bāḷu tōṭadalu bhavāniye gēṇi dharṁma mallappa
gaḷa dharmmavāgi A vināyakadēvarali naḍasi baheU . mallappa
gaḷa baraha . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā [ṁ .*] ṣaṣṭirvva
ruṣa sahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . baradāta va
malapaṁṇanu . śivamastu .
Digital edition of SII 7.342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
